label: SI-2(6)
title: Removal of Previous Versions of Software and Firmware

prose.en: Remove previous versions of {param:si-02.06_odp} after updated versions have been installed.

guidance.en: Previous versions of software or firmware components that are not removed from the system after updates have been installed may be exploited by adversaries. Some products may automatically remove previous versions of software and firmware from the system.

prose.en: previous versions of {param:si-02.06_odp} are removed after updated versions have been installed.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
records of software and firmware component removals after updated versions are installed
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
organizational personnel installing, configuring, and/or maintaining the system
organizational personnel responsible for flaw remediation
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing the removal of previous versions of software/firmware

guidelines.en: software and firmware components to be removed after updated versions have been installed are defined;
